exercises.name: Bench Press
instructions: Lie flat on a bench with your feet firmly on the floor
Grip the barbell slightly wider than shoulder-width
Unrack the bar and hold it directly above your chest with arms extended
Lower the bar slowly to your mid-chest, keeping elbows at about 45 degrees
Press the bar back up to the starting position
Keep your core tight and back slightly arched throughout
tips: Keep shoulder blades pinched together and retracted
Don't bounce the bar off your chest
Drive through your legs for stability
Keep wrists straight to avoid strain

exercises.name: Incline Bench Press
instructions: Set the bench to a 30-45 degree incline
Lie back and grip the bar slightly wider than shoulder-width
Unrack the bar and hold it above your chest
Lower the bar to your upper chest
Press back up to starting position
Keep your back flat against the bench
tips: Control the descent - don't drop the weight
Use a spotter for heavy lifts

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bench Press
instructions: Lie flat on a bench holding dumbbells at chest level
Press the dumbbells up until arms are extended
Lower the dumbbells slowly back to chest level
Keep a slight arch in your lower back
Maintain shoulder blade retraction throughout
tips: Allows for greater range of motion than barbell
Keep dumbbells in line with mid-chest

exercises.name: Push-Ups
instructions: Start in a plank position with hands slightly wider than shoulders
Keep your body in a straight line from head to heels
Lower your chest toward the ground by bending elbows
Push back up to the starting position
Keep core engaged throughout the movement
tips: Don't let hips sag or pike up
Keep elbows at 45 degrees to body

exercises.name: Chest Fly
instructions: Lie on a flat bench or stand between cable towers
Hold weights or cables at chest level with arms extended
With a slight bend in elbows, lower arms out to the sides
Feel a stretch in your chest
Bring arms back together in a hugging motion
tips: Don't go too heavy - this is an isolation exercise
Keep the bend in elbows consistent
Focus on the squeeze at the top

exercises.name: Cable Crossover
instructions: Stand between two cable towers with handles set high
Step forward with one foot for stability
With arms slightly bent, bring hands together in front of you
Squeeze chest at the bottom of the movement
Slowly return to the starting position
tips: Vary the angle to target different parts of chest
Lean slightly forward for lower chest

exercises.name: Barbell Squat
instructions: Position bar on upper back (not neck), grip slightly wider
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly out
Brace core and unrack the weight
Initiate by pushing hips back and bending knees
Squat down until thighs are at least parallel to floor
Drive through heels to stand back up
tips: Keep chest up and back straight
Push knees out in line with toes

exercises.name: Front Squat
instructions: Rest bar on front deltoids, elbows high
Cross arms to secure bar or use clean grip
Stand with feet shoulder-width or slightly wider
Squat down keeping torso upright
Go as deep as mobility allows
Drive through heels to stand

exercises.name: Leg Press
instructions: Sit in leg press machine with back flat against pad
Place feet shoulder-width on platform
Release safety and lower weight by bending knees
Lower until knees are at 90 degrees
Press platform away until legs are almost extended
Don't lock out knees completely

exercises.name: Leg Extension
instructions: Sit in leg extension machine with pad on lower shin
Grip handles for stability
Extend legs until straight
Squeeze quads at the top
Lower slowly back to starting position
tips: Great for quad isolation and pre-exhaust

exercises.name: Leg Curl
instructions: Lie face down on leg curl machine
Position pad just above heels
Curl heels toward glutes
Squeeze hamstrings at the top
Lower slowly back down
tips: Don't lift hips off the pad
Can do stiff-legged for more glute focus

exercises.name: Walking Lunges
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart
Step forward with one leg into a lunge
Lower back knee toward floor
Front thigh should be parallel to floor
Push through front foot to step forward
Alternate legs while walking
tips: Don't let front knee pass toes

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart, holding barbell
Hinge at hips, pushing them back
Keep bar close to legs throughout
Lower until you feel hamstring stretch
Drive hips forward to return to standing
tips: Push hips back like closing a car door

exercises.name: Deadlift
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width, bar over mid-foot
Bend at hips and knees to grip bar
Keep back flat, chest up, shoulders over bar
Drive through heels to stand
Keep bar close to body throughout
Hinge at hips to lower bar back down
tips: Push floor away, don't pull bar up

exercises.name: Barbell Row
instructions: Hinge at hips holding barbell with overhand grip
Keep back flat at 45-degree angle
Pull barbell toward lower chest/upper abs
Squeeze shoulder blades together at top
Lower with control

exercises.name: Pull-Ups
instructions: Hang from bar with overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulders
Pull yourself up until chin is over bar
Keep core engaged, avoid swinging
Lower with control to full arm extension
tips: Use assisted if needed to maintain form

exercises.name: Chin-Ups
instructions: Hang from bar with underhand grip, shoulder-width
Pull yourself up until chin is over bar
Keep body straight, avoid kipping
Lower with control

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
instructions: Sit at lat pulldown machine, secure thighs under pad
Grip bar wider than shoulder-width
Pull bar down to upper chest
Squeeze lats at bottom
Control the return to starting position
tips: Lean back slightly for better angle

exercises.name: Seated Cable Row
instructions: Sit at cable row station with feet on platform
Grab handle with straight arms
Pull handle to abdomen while keeping back straight
Squeeze shoulder blades together
Return with control

exercises.name: Face Pull
instructions: Set cable at face height with rope attachment
Pull rope toward face, separating hands
External rotate shoulders at end
Squeeze rear delts and traps
Return with control

exercises.name: Overhead Press
instructions: Stand with barbell at shoulder level
Grip slightly wider than shoulders
Press bar overhead to full extension
Lock out arms at top
Lower with control to starting position
tips: Keep core tight to avoid lower back strain
Push head through as bar passes

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
instructions: Sit or stand with dumbbells at shoulder height
Palms facing forward
Press dumbbells overhead
Bring dumbbells together at top
Lower with control
tips: More range of motion than barbell

exercises.name: Lateral Raise
instructions: Stand with dumbbells at sides
With slight bend in elbows, raise arms to sides
Lift until arms are parallel to floor
Squeeze delts at top
Lower slowly
tips: Use lighter weight with strict form

exercises.name: Front Raise
instructions: Stand with dumbbells in front of thighs
With straight arms, raise one or both dumbbells forward
Lift to shoulder height
Lower with control

exercises.name: Bicep Curl
instructions: Stand with dumbbells at sides, palms forward
Curl weights toward shoulders
Squeeze biceps at top
Lower with control

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
instructions: Stand with dumbbells at sides, palms facing each other
Curl weights up keeping palms facing each other
Squeeze at top
Lower with control

exercises.name: Tricep Pushdown
instructions: Stand at cable machine with bar or rope at chest height
Grip attachment with elbows at sides
Push down until arms are fully extended
Squeeze triceps at bottom
Return with control

exercises.name: Skull Crushers
instructions: Lie on bench with weight extended over chest
Lower weight toward forehead by bending elbows
Keep upper arms stationary
Extend arms back to starting position
tips: Use EZ bar for wrist comfort
Don't actually hit skull - keep controlled
Can do decline for more challenge

exercises.name: Close-Grip Bench Press
instructions: Lie on bench, grip bar with hands shoulder-width or closer
Lower bar to lower chest
Keep elbows close to body
Press back up
tips: Don't go too narrow - shoulder injury risk

exercises.name: Dips
instructions: Support yourself on parallel bars or dip station
Lower body by bending elbows
Lower until upper arms are parallel to floor
Push back up to starting position
tips: Don't go too deep if you have shoulder issues

exercises.name: Plank
instructions: Start in push-up position on forearms
Keep body in straight line from head to heels
Engage core, don't let hips sag or pike
Hold position for time

exercises.name: Crunches
instructions: Lie on back, knees bent, feet flat
Place hands behind head or crossed on chest
Curl shoulders off floor, engaging abs
Lower with control
tips: Small range of motion is fine

exercises.name: Russian Twist
instructions: Sit with knees bent, feet off floor
Lean back slightly to engage core
Rotate torso side to side
Touch weight to floor each side

exercises.name: Hanging Leg Raise
instructions: Hang from pull-up bar with straight arms
Raise legs until parallel to floor or higher
Keep legs straight or bend knees
Lower with control
tips: Start with bent knees if too hard

exercises.name: Cable Woodchop
instructions: Set cable at chest height, stand sideways
Grab handle with both hands
Rotate and pull cable diagonally down
Control the movement both ways

exercises.name: Calf Raise
instructions: Stand on calf raise machine or edge of step
Lower heels below platform for stretch
Rise up onto balls of feet
Squeeze calves at top
Lower with control
tips: Full range of motion is key
Vary foot angle to target different parts

exercises.name: Hip Thrust
instructions: Sit with upper back against bench, barbell over hips
Drive through heels to lift hips
Squeeze glutes at top
Lower with control
tips: One of the best glute exercises

exercises.name: Glute Bridge
instructions: Lie on back, knees bent, feet flat
Drive through heels to lift hips
Squeeze glutes at top
Lower with control
tips: Great glute activator before heavier lifts
Can add band for more resistance

exercises.name: Farmer's Walk
instructions: Hold heavy weights at sides
Stand tall with shoulders back
Walk with controlled steps
Maintain upright posture

exercises.name: Kettlebell Swing
instructions: Stand with feet wider than shoulder-width
Hinge at hips to grab kettlebell with both hands
Swing kettlebell back between legs
Drive hips forward to swing kettlebell to chest height
Let it swing back down and repeat
tips: Power comes from hips, not arms
Squeeze glutes at top of swing
